---
title: "My Lab"
description: "Your favorited and completed experiments"
toc: false
---

Your personal lab notebook — saved in this browser. Nothing leaves your device.

## Favorites

<div id="my-favorites" class="tracker-list"></div>

## Done <span id="done-count" class="tracker-count"></span>

<button id="export-done" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary tracker-export">Export list</button>

<div id="my-done" class="tracker-list"></div>
